name: kie-ai-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Kie.ai integrations: MCP server and standalone CLI sharing a common core

scripts.build: npm run build -w @felores/kie-ai-core && npm run build -w @felores/kie-ai-openai-server && npm run build -w @felores/kie-ai-mcp-server && npm run build -w @felores/kie-cli
scripts.bundle: npm run build -w @felores/kie-ai-core && npm run build -w @felores/kie-ai-openai-server && npm run bundle -w @felores/kie-ai-mcp-server && npm run bundle -w @felores/kie-cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w @felores/kie-ai-core && npm run test -w @felores/kie-ai-openai-server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @felores/kie-ai-core && npm run typecheck -w @felores/kie-ai-openai-server && npm run typecheck -w @felores/kie-ai-mcp-server && npm run typecheck -w @felores/kie-cli

author: felores
